[c0balt]
logs stack arch search gh

[c0balt]

abstraction is a weapon. use it.

polyglot infrastructure. 9 languages. 11 layers.

❯ Engineering Timeline

0X0-GENESIS genesis Nov the vision 0X1-NEXUS-INIT nexus init Nov started building the bridge 0X2-NEXUS-FIRST-GRIND first grind Dec hit the python wall 0X3-NEXUS-RESTART restart Dec realized python memory is the enemy 0X4-PYPROBE-INIT pyprobe init Feb while building pyjx, realized we need pyprobe first 0X5-PYPROBE-DOCS pyprobe docs Feb cleaned up the mess 0X6-PYJX-INIT pyjx init Mar started building pyjx to talk to java 0X7-PYPROBE-EXTRACTORS pyprobe types Mar x-ray phase complete 0X8-NEXUS-RESURFACE nexus rebuild Apr nexus rebuild with new architecture

❯ Dependency Chain 

PyProbe  →  pins Python memory (THE FOUNDATION)
    ↓
PyJX     →  PyProbe wrapper + Java bridge
    ↓
Nexus    →  FFI bridge via Project Panama
    ↓
COBALT  →  the orchestrator

❯ Foundation Stack (Active)

PyProbe ACTIVE

Memory pinning anchor. X-Ray introspection of CPython internals. Supports int, float, str, bytes, list, tuple, dict, set with cycle detection.

xray: ✅ complete
scalpel: 🔄 in progress
toolkit: 📋 future
C/Python ↗ PyProbe
PyJX BUILDING

Java-Python FFI bridge. Zero-copy memory sharing via PyProbe pointers.

wrapper: ✅ alpha
bridge: 🔄 building
bindings: 📋 future
Python/Java ↗ PyJx
Nexus BUILDING

FFI bridge via Project Panama. Memory allocation via Arena.ofShared(). Uses PyJX for Python interop.

memory: 🔄 rebuilding
ffi: 📋 planning
lifecycle: 📋 planning
Java 25 ↗ Nexus

❯ Specialist Hive

🦀 PLANNING

Guard

Paranoid memory safety. Every buffer gets verified before the next layer touches it.

Layer L04 Rust
→ rust-guardian
🔌 PLANNING

Mechanic

Raw NVIDIA hooks. Wayland compositor access. No drivers between me and the GPU.

Layer L01 C
→ c-mechanic
🚀 PLANNING

Dispatcher

Async networking. API gateway. High-speed orchestration.

Layer L06 Go
→ go-dispatcher
☕ BUILDING

Nexus

Project Panama FFI bridge. The spine that connects everything.

Layer L03 Java 25
→ Nexus
🐍 PLANNING

Researcher

AI models, intent parsing, rapid prototyping.

Layer L05 Python
→ py-researcher
💧 PLANNING

Medic

BEAM VM fault tolerance. When something crashes, the system heals itself.

Layer L09 Elixir
→ elixir-medic
λ PLANNING

Logic

Formal verification. Mathematically proven state transitions.

Layer L07 Haskell
→ haskell-logic
🟢 PLANNING

Scientist

Parallel matrix operations. Spatial physics calculations.

Layer L06 Julia
→ julia-scientist
🌙 PLANNING

Ghost

Hot-swappable scripts. Inject behavior without rebuilds.

Layer L10 Lua
→ lua-ghost

❯ Architecture Layers

L11-L10 Human Intent Governance, Persona
L09-L07 Cognition Medic (Elixir), Logic (Haskell), Temporal
L06-L05 Decision Dispatcher (Go), Scientist (Julia), Researcher (Python)
L04-L01 Execution Guard (Rust), Nexus (Java), Mechanic (C)
> abstraction is a weapon
